findings.title: No-write implementation source not included in the review diff
findings.detail: The new module that exports every CP00-139 public symbol (AUDIT_COMPLIANCE_CP139_PACK_BINDING, AUDIT_COMPLIANCE_CP139_API_UI_REFERENCE_READINESS_CONTRACT, createAuditComplianceCp139CoveredUnitIds, ...Catalog, ...ApiUiReferenceReadiness, ...Manifest, ...HermesEvidencePacket, ...ClaudeReviewPacket, ...CloseoutHandoff, runAuditComplianceCp139ApiUiReferenceReadinessCase, validateAuditComplianceCp139Coverage) is added to the barrel export in packages/audit/src/index.js but the implementation file itself is untracked (git status shows '?? packages/audit/src/api-ui-reference-readiness-catalog.js') and is absent from the supplied diff. For a Risk C pack whose entire purpose is no-write / synthetic-only / reference-only, the code that must guarantee zero side effects could not be inspected directly. All 31 no_write_attestation flags, the unauthorized-exposure flags, the H03/C03 read-only gates, and the 150-unit coverage are constrained only by the in-diff Node test suite and validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs, which call the real functions and assert each flag false.
findings.recommendation: Treat the runtime gate (npm test + validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs passing) as the binding no-write evidence, and confirm the implementation is committed and inspected under C03 scope. Deferred for production_ready: behavior is fully pinned by the in-diff test and validation assertions and matches the already-verified CP135-138 descriptor-only pattern; no defect is observable from the supplied context.

findings.title: Plan/manifest sources backing the exact 150-unit mapping are outside the review diff
findings.detail: The 'map the planned 150 units exactly' requirement is enforced by validateAuditComplianceCp139Coverage(plannedPack), where plannedPack resolves from closeout-pack-plan.json or, as a fallback, docs/closeout-packs/cp00-139/manifest.json plan_binding_snapshot. closeout-pack-plan.json is not modified in this diff and the cp00-139 manifest is not present, so the plan-side enumeration and the coverage cross-check (set equality and contiguity from RP03.P02.M09.S13 to RP03.P04.M02.S07) are verified only at test runtime, not in this review. The in-diff test asserts plannedPack.included_units.length === 150 and coverage deepEquals {ok:true, errors:[], covered_unit_count:150, first_unit_id:'RP03.P02.M09.S13', last_unit_id:'RP03.P04.M02.S07'}.
findings.recommendation: Confirm closeout-pack-plan.json already enumerates CP00-139's 150 included_units (the unchanged git status implies a pre-existing entry) so the runtime coverage gate is authoritative. No code change required if the plan entry exists.

adjudication_notes: Raw Claude review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with P2=1 and P3=1, not production-blocking.

P2 review-context finding is addressed by including packages/audit/src/api-ui-reference-readiness-catalog.js in the CP00-139 implementation commit and by runtime tests/validator executing the module directly.
Direct Claude reinspection is explicitly deferred to preserve the exactly-one valid pack-level review rule.
P3 plan-context finding is confirmed by closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-139 existing 150-unit plan and validateAuditComplianceCp139Coverage(plannedPack) passing.
Unresolved P0/P1/P2 counts are zero after adjudication.
coverage_notes: Contract current_pack rotation is consistent and complete: pack_id CP00-138->CP00-139, planned_pack_id CP00-139, risk_class A->C, unit_count 10->150, range RP03.P02.M09.S13-RP03.P04.M02.S07, production_ready_flag audit_compliance_api_ui_reference_readiness_verified, next_pack_id CP00-140, next_subphase_id RP03.P04.M02.S08; schema_version bumped v0.5->v0.6 with the validation script gate updated to match.

No-write posture verified across all three surfaces: the contract api_ui_reference_readiness_no_write_attestation sets all 31 flags false (accepts_real_client_data, appends/writes/mutates/deletes_audit_event, writes_product_state, creates_database_rows, persists_idempotency_keys/hash_chain_state/retention_policy, modifies_legal_hold, executes_permission_decision/tenant_boundary_check/matter_trace_check/audit_hint_check/audit_query/compliance_export/admin_access_review/api_handler, issues_network_request, acquires_locks, persists_lock_tokens, executes_rollback/retry, renders_ui, executes_ui_interaction, executes_claude_review, sends_claude_prompt, writes_hermes_runtime, implements_ldip, splits_hrx_product); the validation script asserts every one of these false; the test cases assert synthetic_only/no_real_data true and the same flags false.

Required prohibitions are each covered: no API handler execution, no network request, no UI render/interaction, no audit append/write/mutate/delete, no state persistence, no Claude execution or prompt send, no Hermes runtime write, no LDIP implementation, no HRX split.

H03/C03 preserved as evidence/review gates only: hermes.evidence_id H03.CP00-139.audit_compliance_api_ui_reference_readiness, claude.review_id C03.CP00-139.audit_compliance_api_ui_reference_readiness with model claude-opus-4-8, read_only true, executes_review false, sends_claude_prompt false; readiness h03_gate_bound and c03_gate_bound true.

Handoff and lineage verified: upstream/source CP00-138, handoff from CP00-139 to CP00-140 at RP03.P04.M02.S08, cp138_handoff_inherited and cp140_handoff_declared true; range continuity holds (CP00-138 ended at S12, CP00-139 begins at S13).

Internal count integrity confirmed: deliverable_counts (implementation 57, claude_review 6, ui 17, failure_recovery 2, test 12, contract 35, security_audit 18, hermes_evidence 3) sum to 150 and evidence_mode_counts (service_claude_packet_terminal 8, service_closeout_handoff 11, api_reference_readiness 93, api_hermes_evidence_packet 8, api_claude_review_packet 8, api_closeout_handoff 3, ui_reference_readiness 19) sum to 150; both sets are identical between audit.test.js and validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs.

Sensitive-data omission verified: api_ui_reference_readiness_hidden_source_fields lists 26 protected fields including raw_document_body, full_email_body, secret, credential, access_token, private_key, all *_internal_* payloads, cross_tenant_row_count, and unauthorized_object_name; case assertions confirm unauthorized_count_exposed, unauthorized_object_name_exposed, and hidden_field_names_exposed are all false, and domains are reference-only labels.
11 public exports declared in the contract exactly match the symbols imported by audit.test.js and validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs and re-exported via index.js.

Removing cp138 from the final console.log summary does not orphan cp138CoveredUnits/cp138Handoff: their CP00-138 validation blocks remain present and unchanged above, so no unused bindings are introduced.

Limitation: the implementation module (packages/audit/src/api-ui-reference-readiness-catalog.js) is untracked and not in the diff (see P2); behavior is constrained only via the in-diff test and validation assertions.

Limitation: closeout-pack-plan.json and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-139/manifest.json are not in the diff (see P3); the exact plan-to-catalog 150-unit mapping and validateAuditComplianceCp139Coverage cross-check are exercised only at test runtime.
